description: Wire the 4 admin observability components and the 4 remaining app pages (QuantAI ask/voice, QuantChat camera/map) to real API endpoints. Replace all hardcoded mock arrays with fetch calls.
steps: Wire apps/admin/src/app/observability/components/ServiceHealthGrid.tsx: Replace the hardcoded services array with a fetch to /api/health. Map the response apps+services arrays to the ServiceHealth interface. Add loading/error states.
Wire apps/admin/src/app/observability/components/ErrorTracker.tsx: Replace mockErrors array with a fetch to /api/audit?action=ERROR or create a new /api/errors/recent route. Add loading/error states.
Wire apps/admin/src/app/observability/components/LatencyChart.tsx: Add a fetch to /api/health and derive latency data from the responseTimeMs fields in the response. Replace any hardcoded data.
Wire apps/admin/src/app/observability/components/ServiceMap.tsx: Fetch from /api/health and use the apps/services list to build the dependency map. Replace hardcoded data.

Wire apps/quantai/src/app/ask/page.tsx: The form handleSubmit currently uses setTimeout as placeholder. Wire it to call POST /api/assistant/chat with the query text. Show the AI response below the input. Use the existing API route at apps/quantai/src/app/api/assistant/chat/route.ts.

Wire apps/quantai/src/app/voice/page.tsx: Add state for transcript and AI response. Wire the VoiceInput onTranscript callback to send the transcript to POST /api/assistant/chat and display the response. Add loading/error states.

Wire apps/quantchat/src/app/map/page.tsx: Replace the hardcoded friends array with a fetch. Create a new API route at apps/quantchat/src/app/api/map/friends/route.ts that returns friend locations (mock data in the API route itself). The page should fetch from /api/map/friends.

Wire apps/quantchat/src/app/camera/page.tsx: This page is primarily a camera UI with no data to fetch. Add a minimal fetch to /api/stories (POST) when the shutter button is pressed - wire the capture action to call the existing stories creation API. Add an onCapture handler that POSTs to /api/stories.
acceptance_criteria: All 4 observability components fetch data from /api/health or other admin API routes
QuantAI ask page sends queries to POST /api/assistant/chat and displays responses
QuantAI voice page sends transcripts to the AI backend and shows responses
QuantChat map page fetches friend locations from a new /api/map/friends route
QuantChat camera page wires capture to POST /api/stories
findings: All 8 components/pages wired successfully. TypeScript compiles with zero errors across all 3 apps (@quant/admin, @quant/quantai, @quant/quantchat). Created 1 new API route: /api/map/friends. Pre-commit hooks passed (prettier reformatted). All observability components fetch from /api/health and derive their data. App pages wire to POST /api/assistant/chat and POST /api/stories respectively.
